query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding activity in June–July 2026:

## Bottom Line
**Mistral AI is the only one of the three with an imminent/expected round in July 2026.** OpenAI and Anthropic both closed record-breaking rounds earlier in 2026 and have pivoted to IPO preparation rather than new private raises.

## By Company

**OpenAI** — No new round in June–July 2026. Closed its record $122B round at an $852B post-money valuation on March 31, 2026 (co-led by SoftBank; Amazon, Nvidia, Microsoft, a16z, etc.). June–July activity is IPO prep: confidential draft S-1 filed with the SEC (reported May 22 / June 8), Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading, possible Q4 2026 debut.

**Anthropic** — No new round in June–July 2026. Closed its Series H on May 28, 2026: $65B at a $965B post-money valuation, briefly making it the world's most valuable AI startup (topping OpenAI). Co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia. Run-rate revenue crossed $47B. Positioned as likely its last private raise before an expected ~December 2026 IPO.

**Mistral AI (the imminent one)** — In early-stage talks since **June 12, 2026** (Bloomberg, confirmed by TechCrunch/SiliconANGLE) to raise **~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23B) valuation** — nearly double its Sept 2025 Series C (€1.7B at €11.7B). As of July 4–10, 2026, this round was **not yet confirmed closed**; terms could still change. Mistral remains far smaller than its US peers (~$4B total raised).

The full structured findings (key facts, 14 quantitative data points, and 18 sources) have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

**Caveat:** These findings reflect the mid-2026 information environment as returned by current sources; some valuations vary slightly by source/currency conversion, and Mistral's round remains in-progress/unconfirmed.

key_facts: OpenAI closed a $122 billion round at $852 billion post-money valuation, announced March 31, 2026 (co-led by SoftBank; a16z, D.E. Shaw, MGX, TPG, T. Rowe Price, Amazon, Nvidia, Microsoft).

OpenAI's June–July 2026 activity is IPO preparation, not a new equity round: confidential draft S-1 filed with the SEC (reported May 22 / June 8, 2026), Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading, possible Q4 2026 debut.
Anthropic closed its Series H on May 28, 2026 — $65 billion at $965 billion post-money valuation, briefly the most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI's $852B.
Anthropic's Series H was co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia; run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion in early May 2026.
No new OpenAI or Anthropic private equity round was announced in June–July 2026; both have pivoted to IPO tracks.
Mistral AI is in EARLY-STAGE talks (reported June 12, 2026 by Bloomberg) to raise ~€3 billion (~$3.5 billion) at ~€20 billion (~$23 billion) valuation — nearly double its Series C.
Mistral's rumored round was NOT confirmed closed as of July 4–10, 2026; it remained in negotiation with terms potentially changing.
Mistral's prior Series C (Sept 2025) was €1.7B (~$2B) at €11.7B (~$14B) post-money, led by ASML; plus $830M debt financing in March 2026.
Mistral remains far smaller than peers: ~$4B total raised vs. OpenAI ~$186B and Anthropic ~$161B in valuation-scale financing.
